reviews.review_description: Eventhough this is usually not my type of game, it is done close to perfection for what it should be! Not only the physics and the simple but polished graphics (love the realtimeshadows in that one) the leveldesign is outstanding!! Really good ideas, never gets boring. Well done!!!

A great game thats sure to keep you playing for countless hours. The developer has also been very kind and super responsive to suggestions I made to improve the controls. The sensitivity is now adjustable which makes a world of a difference.  Excellent support and a very enjoyable game. 5 Stars from me for sure.

reviews.review_title: Too hard to control ball movement

developer_response.body: Try current version please. Sensitivity is lower and you can set it as you like.

reviews.review_description: Is it possible to add more environments or is it just solo?

developer_response.body: Hello and thanks!. In upcoming update I want to add leaderboards. More environments is also good idea. Let me know what you like to see: cenda@cenda.cz

reviews.review_description: Really enjoy this simple tricky game...need a steady hand on the controller....very addictive good price long term value I think
Like the title says this is a fun game that gets increasingly challenging as you move up through the levels. The ball physics work great and I love the option to adjust the controller sensitivity.
